title: M&G 8MM*90MM ROUND CRAYON ( 12 COLOURS )
subtitle: M&G 8MM*90MM ROUND CRAYON
overview: Our M&G 8MM*90MM round crayon is designed with an easy-to-grip shape, making it comfortable for both children and adults to hold. It provides a smooth drawing experience, with its uniform and vibrant colouring properties. Its compact size makes it portable and easy to carry around, making it an ideal choice for artists and colourists on the go.

title: M&G ERGO GRIP COLOUR PENCIL ( 24 COLOURS )
subtitle: M&G ERGO GRIP COLOUR
overview: Our M&G ergo grip colour pencils are triangular-shaped, making them easy to grip and preventing them from rolling off tables. They come in a variety of bright and vivid colours that allow for smooth and consistent painting. These pencils are also break-resistant, ensuring that they last longer and don't crumble under pressure. They come pre-sharpened, making them ready to use right out of the box. Overall, they are a great choice for anyone looking for a comfortable, colourful, and reliable drawing experience.

title: M&G WATER COLOR PAINT CAKES ( 12 COLOURS )
subtitle: M&G WATER COLOR PAINT
overview: Our M&G all-dry watercolour paint cakes are a type of paint that comes in solid cake form, which can be activated with water to create liquid paint. These paint cakes have excellent water solubility and provide a smooth painting with natural transitions. They are convenient to use and are a popular choice for artists of all levels. The paint cakes can be used with two brushes, one for applying the paint and the other for blending and creating texture. To use the paint cakes, simply wet the brush and rub it over the cake until the desired amount of pigment is picked up. Then, apply the paint to your surface and continue to add water or blend with the second brush as desired to achieve your desired effect.

title: M&G PALLETTE PAINT TRAY ( 10 WELLS )
subtitle: M&G PALLETTE PAINT TRAY
overview: Our M&G palette tray with 10 wells is a useful tool for artists and hobbyists alike. Its arm-shaped design makes it easy to grip, while its durable construction ensures it will last for many projects to come. Additionally, the tray's smooth surface makes it easy to clean after use, allowing for a hassle-free creative experience.

title: M&G TWISTABLE CRAYONS ( 12 COLOURS )
subtitle: M&G TWISTABLE CRAYONS (
overview: Our M&G twistable crayons feature a unique twist-up design that eliminates the need for sharpening, making them convenient for drawing on the go. This design also ensures that the crayon remains unsticky-to-hand during use, providing a smooth and comfortable drawing experience. The crayons come in a range of vibrant colours and are perfect for colouring, drawing, and other creative activities.

title: M&G WRITING BRUSH WITH INK ( 25ML )
subtitle: M&G WRITING BRUSH WITH
overview: Our M&G writing brush with ink is an essential tool for Chinese calligraphy. The brush features an ink storage barrel that can hold a large volume of ink, making it easy to use and carry. The ink flows smoothly through the brush, creating crisp, precise strokes on paper. The brush can be easily refilled, ensuring that the artist always has enough ink for their work. Its portability and convenience make it a popular choice among calligraphers. Our brush's flexibility and absorbency also allow for a range of strokes and styles, making it a key tool in Chinese calligraphy.

title: M&G WATER BRUSH SET * BRISTLES & NYLON WOOLS * ( 5 PCS )
subtitle: M&G WATER BRUSH SET
overview: Our M&G water brush set is a versatile choice for artists working with acrylic, oil, gouache, or watercolour paints. With two flat-tip bristles and three round-tip nylon wools, the brushes offer a range of strokes and techniques. The soft and flexible brush hairs provide excellent control and precision, while the sturdy wooden handles ensure comfortable use. The rust-free double-crimped aluminium ferrules add durability and longevity to the brushes and make them easy to clean with just a little soap and water. Overall, this brush set is a great investment for any artist looking for quality tools that can handle multiple mediums.

title: M&G MINI COLOUR PENCIL WITH SHARPERNER ( 24 COLOURS/DRUMS)
subtitle: M&G MINI COLOUR PENCIL
overview: Our M&G mini colour pencils are small, compact pencils that are perfect for on-the-go colouring. Despite their small size, they provide vibrant colour and precision for detailed artwork. Comes in a variety of colours and also a sharpener is included per drum.

title: M&G MINI COLOUR PENCIL WITH SHARPERNER ( 12 COLOURS/DRUMS)
subtitle: M&G MINI COLOUR PENCIL
overview: Our M&G mini colour pencils are small, compact pencils that are perfect for on-the-go colouring. Despite their small size, they provide vibrant colour and precision for detailed artwork. Comes in a variety of colours and also a sharpener is included per drum.

title: M&G WATER COLOUR MARKER ( SOFT BRUSH TIP ) (12 COLOURS/SET)
subtitle: M&G WATER COLOUR MARKER
overview: Our M&G soft tip watercolour pen is a type of pen that has a flexible and delicate tip made of synthetic materials. This tip allows for a variety of lines and strokes to be depicted on paper by applying different amounts of pressure and adjusting the angle of the pen. The ink used in soft-tip watercolour pens is water-based and is designed to blend seamlessly with similar colours, allowing for the creation of beautiful watercolour effects with ease. By simply dabbing a plain brush into water and onto the page, the ink can be thinned out and spread to create a gradual change in colour. One of the benefits of using a soft-tip watercolour pen is that it allows for a great deal of control and precision in creating artwork. The delicate tip makes it easy to create fine details, while the watercolour effects add depth and texture to the piece. Additionally, the ability to thin out the ink means that the artist can adjust the intensity of the colours to suit their needs.

title: M&G MIFFY WATERCOLOR GEL CRAYONS ( 48 COLOURS )
subtitle: M&G MIFFY WATERCOLOR GEL
overview: M&G Miffy Watercolor Gel Crayons are a type of art supply that can be used to create colourful and vivid artwork. These crayons are soluble, which means that they can be blended and mixed together to create unique colour combinations. The smooth writing of these crayons ensures that they glide easily over the paper, making them ideal for colouring and drawing. The bright colours of the Watercolor Gel Crayons are perfect for creating eye-catching artwork, and the colour-mixing capabilities allow for endless creativity and experimentation.

title: M&G WATER COLOUR BLOCKS SET ( 12 COLOURS + 2 )
subtitle: M&G WATER COLOUR BLOCKS
overview: Product Introduction: The M&G Watercolor Blocks Set is the ultimate all-in-one solution for artists of all skill levels. Available in sets of 12, 24, and 36 colors, each set also includes 2 extra free colors, ensuring even more options for creative expression. Featuring delicate pigments with good water solubility, this set offers excellent blending and diffusivity for soft, transparent color effects after drying. The upgraded formula ensures vibrant, long-lasting colors, and the set comes with all the essential tools—a premium nylon brush, detachable palette, and a high-quality sponge for water absorption. The compact flip design adds convenience, making it easy to carry anywhere. Ideal for school projects, hobbies, or professional artwork, this set guarantees a premium watercolor experience. Product Highlights: 12, 24, 36+2 Colors: Each set comes with 2 extra color blocks for free, offering more variety and creative possibilities. Delicate Pigment, Good Water Solubility: High solubil
key_features: 12, 24, 36+2 Colors:Each set comes with 2 extra color blocks for free, offering more variety and creative possibilities.
Delicate Pigment, Good Water Solubility:High solubility and excellent color mixing effect.
Blending & Diffusivity:Unique soft color blend with good transparency after drying, perfect for layering.
Formula Upgrade, More Vibrant Colors:Compared to regular solid watercolors, these pigments are more vivid and eye-catching.
Flip Design for Easy Portability:The detachable box cover serves as a color palette, adding portability and convenience.
Imported Nylon Brush:Durable and high-quality nylon brush with good toughness, ensuring smooth application and no splitting.
Block Diameter:23mm & 30mm blocks that can be used to paint up to 90 pictures.
Complimentary High-Quality Sponge:The sponge has excellent water absorption, making it easy to draw and blend colors.

title: M&G TRIANGLE ACRYLIC MARKER SET ( 12/24/36/48 COLOURS )
subtitle: M&G TRIANGLE ACRYLIC MARKER
overview: Product Introduction: The M&G Triangle Acrylic Marker Set is designed for artists, students, and professionals seeking vibrant and versatile markers for their creative projects. These markers feature a triangular grip for a comfortable hold, ensuring precise strokes. Available in sets of 12, 24, 36, and 48 colors, they are suitable for various surfaces, including paper, wood, glass, ceramic, fabric, plastic, and more. Their waterproof and fade-resistant formula ensures consistent, long-lasting results across multiple surfaces. The water-based ink provides strong coverage and allows for instant use, while the odorless, non-toxic, and safe formula makes these markers suitable for both children and adults. Additionally, the durable tip ensures smooth drawing for a hassle-free creative experience.
